name: knowledge-vault
description: Project-scoped knowledge base with ingestion (URL, Zotero, PubMed/Scholar), preserved originals + bibliographic slugs, PageIndex tree indexing per PDF, 4-tier reasoning-routed query, and Obsidian browsing.

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped knowledge base for research workflows.
interface.longDescription: Knowledge Vault ingests papers, notes, and web clips into a structured `.vault` workspace, preserves originals, builds PageIndex trees for PDFs, and enables grounded querying in Obsidian-ready markdown.
defaultPrompt: Set up a new knowledge vault for this project
Collect and ingest recent relevant papers
Compile and query research insights with confidence
